data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Instagram employs a microservices architecture that allows different services to evolve independently.
data.technical_spec: Based on RESTful services, interconnected via APIs.

data.title: Frontend Framework
data.description: The site uses React.js for its dynamic and responsive user interface.
data.technical_spec: Built using React version 17+ with custom hooks.

data.title: Database Management
data.description: Utilizes robust database solutions to handle large volumes of user data efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Primary databases include PostgreSQL and NoSQL variants like Cassandra.

data.title: Image and Video Hosting
data.description: Specialized backend systems for optimizing media storage and delivery.
data.technical_spec: Content Delivery Network (CDN) implementation with cloud storage solutions.

data.title: Scalable Infrastructure
data.description: Designed to support billions of users, ensuring minimal downtime.
data.technical_spec: AWS, Kubernetes, and containerization technologies are used.
